overall.description: Aerial drone footage gliding through a dense cyberpunk metropolis at night, showcasing towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon advertisements and holographic billboards. The scene features atmospheric haze, wet streets reflecting colorful lights, and a mix of futuristic and industrial architecture typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of neon-lit commercial district

agents.ego_description: flying drone camera moving smoothly forward and left through the city canyon, surveying the neon-lit skyline

entered.detail: tall building with large vertical VOTE advertisement and political figure hologram
illuminated corporate signage for Orbital Air on distant building
elevated highway structure with moving vehicle lights
dense cluster of skyscrapers with various neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Opening aerial view of a cyberpunk city at night, dominated by a towering building with a prominent VOTE billboard. The camera drifts forward through the hazy atmosphere, with the Orbital Air sign visible on the left and a highway overpass on the right. Sparse traffic moves along the streets below as neon lights reflect off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with food advertising towers

events.description: camera pans past the vote billboard revealing the kabayan foods tower with bright red neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing drone flight moving leftward past the vote building, focusing on the kabayan foods and cali express towers

entered.detail: building with large red neon 'kabayan foods' signage on multiple levels
structure with prominent teal circular 'C' logo and CALI EXPRESS text

segments.scene_description: The drone continues its leftward trajectory, passing the VOTE building to reveal the Kabayan Foods tower with its distinctive red neon signage and the Cali Express building with its glowing teal logo. The camera maintains a steady aerial perspective, capturing the dense vertical architecture and persistent haze of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: major avenue intersection with DTR tower

events.description: camera reveals the DTR tower and opens up to a wide view of the main avenue stretching into the distance

agents.ego_description: drone continues moving left and slightly descending, focusing on the DTR building and the avenue view

entered.detail: building with prominent blue and red DTR neon signage
wide multi-lane road stretching into the distance with vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the DTR tower with its distinctive neon signage as the camera continues moving left. The view opens up to show a wide avenue stretching into the hazy distance, with the Kabayan Foods and Cali Express buildings now positioned to the right. The drone maintains its smooth aerial trajectory, capturing the sprawling neon-lit cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a hazy cyberpunk metropolis, shifting from a focused view of a single towering landmark to a sprawling panorama of the neon-lit cityscape. It begins by drifting forward toward a massive building dominated by a VOTE billboard, passing an Orbital Air sign and a highway overpass where lights reflect off wet streets below. As the camera maintains its steady trajectory, it veers leftward to reveal the dense vertical architecture of the Kabayan Foods tower with its red neon signage and the glowing teal logo of the Cali Express building. The scene then opens further to reveal the DTR tower as the perspective expands, shifting the previous buildings to the right. Finally, the view widens into a broad avenue that stretches deep into the atmospheric haze, capturing the immense scale of the glowing urban expanse.
